text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Yasuda Kinen, and Sakura
Chiyono O nervously prepares for the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter if she's passed her physical peak
or not. She swears to prove she's still growing
either way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Waiting for her on the track is Bamboo Memory,
who switched from running dirt races to turf races
with immediate success.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O steels herself to run against
this up-and-coming Umamusume as the Yasuda
Kinen begins.
